translated: The Lord Jesus said to them, “There is no one who can enter the kingdom of heaven unless they turn and become like a child. I tell you the truth, whoever receives a child in my name receives me. Unless you turn and become like children, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven.”

translated: Jesus said to them, "I say to you, if you believe, you will see the Kingdom of Heaven prepared for your Father to give you, and many will come from east and west to recline with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob in the kingdom of Israel, and they will be there."

translated: When they came to him, Jesus sent and went to John with his twelve disciples and said, "Behold, I am sending you on the way; do not enter any town or city. And when you enter a house, greet the people there."
